name: Soupa Fasolakia Freska (Krema)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat half of the vegetable shortening in a large pot.
2. Sauté onions until light golden color, about 5 minutes.
3. Add green beans, carrots, and parsley; sauté for another 2-3 minutes.
4. Pour in 10 cups of meat stock and bring to a low boil.
5. Reduce heat to maintain a gentle simmer and cook the vegetables until tender (approximately 45 minutes).
6. Pass the soup through a fine-mesh strainer or blend with an immersion blender, returning it to the pot.
7. In a separate smaller pot, heat the remaining shortening.
8. Gradually add flour while stirring continuously until well combined.
9. Slowly pour in the hot meat stock and continue to stir until the sauce thickens.
10. Season with salt and pepper as desired.
11. Remove from heat and stir in butter.
12. Return the bean puree to the pot, bring to a gentle boil, then incorporate the sauce.
13. Mix well and serve hot, garnished with croutons if desired.
If the soup is too thick, thin it by adding more hot broth.
